scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "python -m uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.dev:backend: python -m uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.test:backend: python -m uv run --project backend --group dev pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml
